meaning: adj.狂暴的,激烈的,患有狂犬病的
examples: The party has distanced itself from the more rabid nationalist groups in the country.
the likelihood of the implicated animal being rabid
Rabid animals on the loose frequent our TVs and newsfeeds.
But in China this is a national craze, and rabid fans treat top players like stars.
They were rabid in saying that Bernanke must no, under any circumstances, do QE3.
